positive: A stylized, graphic depiction of a nebula embracing a wandering celestial creature, like a graceful, ethereal fox or jaguar with flowing, cosmic fur. The design should feature stark, bioluminescent blues, deep purples, and touches of vibrant cyan, set against a midnight black background. Use clean, strong silhouettes and geometric linework inspired by Art Nouveau and modern celestial cartography. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, designed to be a striking, non-repeating graphic print for apparel. Cinematic, high contrast, clean vectors, high detail, maximalist print design, perfect for screen printing.
